questions.question: What is the theme of the ‘NIC TechConclave 2020’, organized by the National Informatics Centre (NIC)?
questions.explanation: The Union Minister for Electronics & Information Technology, Ravi Shankar Prasad is to inaugurate the second edition of ‘NIC TechConclave 2020’ in New Delhi. It is a two-day event being organized by the National Informatics Centre (NIC). The theme of this edition of the event is ‘Technologies for NextGen Governance’. Several experts from the fields of Cyber Security, Hyperscale Architecture, Design Thinking are to participate in the conclave and share their knowledge. This Conclave will enhance the capacity building of Government officers across the country and will help in delivering better citizen-centric services.

questions.question: Which Indian musician has been selected for the Madhya Pradesh government’s prestigious National Lata Mangeshkar Award 2018?
questions.explanation: Famous Hindi music director Kuldeep Singh has been selected for the Madhya Pradesh government’s prestigious National Lata Mangeshkar Award for 2018. Another famous female playback singer Suman Kalyanpur was selected for the award, for the year 2017. The Madhya Pradesh government instituted the award in 1984-85 to recognize the contribution made by the artistes in the field of music. The award, which was named after the legendary musician Lata Mangeshkar, will be presented in February at an event in the city of Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

questions.question: Which food-delivery start-up recently acquired Uber’s food delivery platform, Uber Eats in India?
questions.explanation: The Indian food delivery start-up firm Zomato recently announced its acquisition of Uber’s food delivery platform, Uber Eats, in India. According to the deal, Uber gets a 9.99% ownership in Zomato. After the acquisition, Uber Eats will discontinue its operations in India. It will also re-direct its restaurants, delivery partners, and customers using the Uber Eats apps, to the Zomato platform. This deal will cut the loss-making business of Uber and it will continue to focus on improving its ride-hailing business in India.

questions.question: The recently set-up ‘National Start-up Advisory Council’ is to be chaired by which Union Minister?

options.label: A
options.text: Minister of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

options.label: D
options.text: Minister of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship

questions.explanation: The Union government recently announced that a National Start-up Advisory Council has been set up. The Council will advise the Centre on steps to be taken to create a strong environment for start-up companies in India. The Council will be chaired by the Union Commerce minister while it will have non-official members with 2-year-term, to be nominated by the Centre. Other members include founders of successful start-ups and veterans who have started and grown companies in India. The nominees of the ministries and organisations concerned, not below the rank of joint secretary will be ex-officio members.

questions.question: Which state has been ranked first in the list of India’s top 10 States for Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED)?
questions.explanation: The US-based leading certification agency, Green Business Certification Inc. recently released the list of India’s top 10 States for Leadership in Energy and Environmental Design (LEED). Maharashtra has been ranked at the top spot among the states, in the global green building rating system. The building which obtained the rating has low carbon emissions. The system ranks Indian states in terms of cumulative gross square meters (GSM) of space, certified by the LEED system. Maharashtra has attained over one crore GSM development and retains its first position for the second year, followed by Karnataka, Haryana, Tamil Nadu and Uttar Pradesh.

questions.question: Which Indian State/ UT has won the Khelo India Youth Games Champions trophy, 2020?
questions.explanation: The Team of Maharashtra dominated the Khelo India Youth Games by clinching the overall trophy for the second time with a huge haul of 256 medals, including 78 gold and 77 silver. Last year, Maharashtra topped the table with 228 medals. The trophy was presented to Maharashtra by the Chief Minister of Assam Sarbananda Sonowal in the presence of Union Sports Minister Kiren Rijju, during the closing ceremony. The second place was bagged by the state of Haryana with 200 medals and Delhi with 122 medals. Khelo India Youth games has been organised in Assam’s Guwahati for the last 13 days.

questions.question: When is the International Day of Education observed every year ?
questions.explanation: January 24 is observed as the International Day of Education every year by UNESCO. It celebrates the role of education for Development and Peace. The theme for this year’s International Day of Education is “LEARNING FOR PEOPLE, PLANET, PROSPERITY AND PEACE”. On December 2018, the United Nations (UN) General Assembly adopted a resolution, which declared January 24 as ‘International Day of Education’. This year’s celebration is the second-year of observing the day and it has considered Education and Learning as the greatest Renewable Resource and it reaffirms that the Education is a Fundamental Right.

questions.question: Who has been recently awarded with the Subash Chandra Bose Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar, 2020?
questions.explanation: Kumar Munnan Singh has been selected for the Subhash Chandra Bose Aapda Prabandhan Puraskar 2020 under the Individual category. Under the Institution category, Disaster Mitigation & Management Centre, Uttarakhand has been selected for the award. Kumar Munnan Singh was the founding member of the National Disaster Management Authority in 2005. He is also lauded for establishing the National Disaster Response Force (NDRF), from scratch. The award is given by the Government of India to recognize the commendable work done by individuals and organisations in the field of disaster management. The award is announced every year on 23rd January which marks the birth anniversary of Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose.

questions.question: Russia has been selected as the focal theme country of which International Book fair of India, recently?
questions.explanation: The 44th International Kolkata Book Fair is set to be inaugurated in Kolkata by the Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee and Russian Ambassador to India Nikolay Rishatovich Kudashev. Russia has been selected as the focal theme country of the international fair, whose theme gate will be a replica of the iconic Bolshoi Theatre of Moscow. The annual fair is to be held from January 29 to February 9, which is set to host about 600 books stalls. Several eco-friendly measures have been taken in the event, in which nearly 20 countries will be participating. Kolkata Literature Festival will also be held alongside the book fair.

questions.question: The first e-waste clinic of India was recently opened in which city?
questions.explanation: India’s first e-waste clinic, which is jointly set up by the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB) and Bhopal Municipal Corporation (BMC) was recently inaugurated in the city of Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh. The clinic would process, segregate and dispose the electronic waste from both household and commercial units. The e-waste will be collected door-to-door from the city while it can also be deposited in the clinic. It is being opened in Bhopal as a pilot project and it will be extended to other parts of the country once this turns successful.
